evals.prompt: 请审计这份短设计稿：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/minimal-migration-design.md。重点只看输出结构是否正确：必须包含 Executive Summary、Triggered Modules、Findings、Suggested Additions、Open Questions、Report Path，并且不能直接修改原文档。
evals.expected_output: A lightweight audit that follows the exact output structure, does not edit the source document, writes a report under docs/reports, and gives a three-option comparison table plus a recommendation for each material finding.
expectations: The response uses the required section structure from the skill
The audit does not modify the source document
The response includes a report path under docs/reports
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.prompt: review 这份短设计文档 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/state-machine-review-design.md 。我不想直接改稿，只需要你告诉我缺了哪些关键设计决策，并给出可以直接补进去的建议段落。请特别判断应该触发哪些 checklist 条件模块。
evals.expected_output: An audit that correctly triggers the state machine, concurrency, and async-job style modules when the document clearly implies them, reports findings in CRXX [P#] format, compares three repair options in table form per material finding, and proposes copy-ready additions based on the recommended option.
expectations: The audit triggers the state machine or orchestration module
The audit identifies at least one concurrency or recovery-related design gap
The findings use the CRXX [P#] format
At least one material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommendation, and rejection reasons for the other options

evals.prompt: 帮我检查这个真实方案是不是能直接进实现：docs/exec-plans/completed/2026-03-09-user-language-field-remediation-implementation-plan.md。虽然它是 implementation plan，但我想按 design review 的方式看有没有前置决策缺失、兼容性风险或者数据处理问题。输出报告到 docs/reports。
evals.expected_output: A realistic audit over a repo document that surfaces missing design decisions, compatibility risks, or data handling gaps and writes the report to docs/reports.
expectations: The audit applies the design-decision checklist to an implementation-facing document
The output surfaces compatibility, data handling, or migration gaps
The audit writes a report to docs/reports

evals.prompt: 请审计这份简单设计稿：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/simple-copy-design.md。重点验证你不要过度触发复杂模块。这只是一个文案与展示字段调整，不涉及状态机、并发控制、异步任务、人工审核或扫描告警。
evals.expected_output: An audit that stays within the core checklist, does not invent complex triggered modules, and keeps findings focused on the actual scope of a simple design.
expectations: The audit does not trigger state machine, concurrency, async job, human review, or scan-and-alert modules
The audit keeps findings scoped to simple compatibility, rollout, or observability questions
The findings still use the CRXX [P#] format if any findings are present

evals.prompt: review 这份性能设计文档 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/index-tuning-design.md 。这里明确是查询路径和索引优化，请验证模块命中要克制：应该关注性能与索引，不要误触发状态机、锁、人工审核之类无关模块。
evals.expected_output: An audit that triggers the performance and index module, stays focused on query and storage effects, and avoids unrelated orchestration or human-review modules.
expectations: The audit triggers the performance and index module
The audit does not trigger state machine, human review, or scan-and-alert modules
The findings remain focused on query impact, index plan, compatibility, or observability

evals.prompt: 请审计这份边界测试设计稿：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/status-label-alignment-design.md。这里会出现 `status`、`enum`、`source` 这些词，但它不是状态机改造。请验证不要因为这些词就误触发状态机、并发、异步任务或人工审核模块。
evals.expected_output: An audit that treats the design as a compatibility and contract-alignment change, does not over-trigger orchestration modules, and keeps findings focused on schema, compatibility, or observability issues.
expectations: The audit does not trigger state machine, concurrency, async job, or human review modules
The findings focus on compatibility, schema, or source-of-truth concerns rather than workflow transitions
The findings use the CRXX [P#] format if any findings are present

evals.prompt: review 这份边界测试设计文档 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/json-payload-contract-design.md 。这里有 shared JSON、status/source 字段、unknown keys 等内容。请验证应该命中半结构化 payload 模块，但不要误触发状态机、人工审核或扫描告警模块。
evals.expected_output: An audit that triggers the semi-structured payload module, stays focused on schema ownership and merge rules, and avoids unrelated state-machine or scan modules.
expectations: The audit triggers the semi-structured payload module
The audit does not trigger state machine, human review, or scan-and-alert modules
The findings remain focused on schema ownership, merge rules, compatibility, or observability

evals.prompt: 请把这份文档当作来自另一个没有 AGENTS.md、没有 CONTRIBUTING.md、也没有固定报告目录的仓库，只按文档本身做通用设计审计：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/standalone-generic-design.md。不需要保存到文件，只在对话里输出。
evals.expected_output: An audit that falls back to the skill's default rules, does not rely on repo-specific conventions, uses the required section structure, sets Report Path to chat-only, and includes table-based option analysis for material findings.
expectations: The audit can run without relying on AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, or a repo checklist
The Report Path section uses chat-only output rather than a docs/reports path
The findings use the default CRXX [P#] format when no repo-specific format is inherited
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.prompt: review 这份独立设计稿 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/standalone-checklist-design.md，并优先遵循我提供的 checklist：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/standalone-review-checklist.md。把它当作另一个仓库的文档，不要套用当前仓库现有规则。
evals.expected_output: An audit that prioritizes the explicitly provided checklist over unrelated repo conventions, keeps the standard section structure, focuses on the decisions called out by the provided checklist, and compares three repair options in table form for each material finding.
expectations: The audit follows the explicitly provided checklist instead of depending on the repo checklist
The findings focus on rollout, data handling, and observability items named in the provided checklist
The output keeps the required six-section structure even in standalone mode
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.prompt: review 这份独立设计稿 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/conflict-checklist-design.md。优先使用我提供的 design checklist：.agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/conflict-design-review-checklist.md。另一个文件 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/conflict-release-checklist.md 只是无关的 release checklist，不要把它混进设计审计结论里，也不要保存报告到文件。
evals.expected_output: An audit that obeys the explicitly provided design checklist, ignores the unrelated release checklist, keeps the six required sections, stays chat-only, and includes three-option repair analysis in table form for each material finding.
expectations: The audit prioritizes the explicitly provided design checklist over the unrelated release checklist
The findings stay focused on rollout, data handling, backward compatibility, or observability rather than approvals or deployment ownership
The Report Path section stays chat-only and the output keeps the required six-section structure
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.prompt: 请审计这份设计文档 .agents/skills/design-decision-audit/evals/files/standalone-generic-design.md。虽然文档内容是英文，但请根据我的中文指令自动用中文输出整份审计结果，不要保存到文件。
evals.expected_output: An audit that infers Chinese from the user instruction, keeps the standard section structure in Chinese, stays chat-only, and still includes table-based option analysis for material findings.
expectations: The audit outputs the report in Chinese rather than English
The report uses the localized Chinese section headings while preserving the standard structure
The Report Path section remains chat-only
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.expected_output: A full design-decision audit triggered from a minimal Chinese prompt, using Chinese output, the standard section structure, and table-based option analysis for material findings.
expectations: The minimal Chinese prompt still triggers a full design-decision audit
The audit outputs the report in Chinese
The report uses the standard section structure rather than a one-line summary
Each material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected

evals.expected_output: A full design-decision audit triggered from a minimal English prompt, using English output, the standard section structure, triggered modules, and table-based option analysis for material findings.
expectations: The minimal English prompt still triggers a full design-decision audit
The audit outputs the report in English
The audit still identifies the state-machine style triggered modules
At least one material finding includes a three-option comparison table, one recommended option, and reasons the other options were not selected
